prompt: Add a weighted-average helper to the calculator fixture using the standard formula sum(value * weight) / sum(weights), cover it with tests, update the fixture README, and finish with verification plus review status. Include at least one unequal-weight example such as [10, 20] with weights [3, 1] producing 12.5, and handle obvious invalid input like mismatched list lengths.
success_criteria: New user-facing capability is implemented using the standard weighted-average formula
Tests were added or updated and executed, including an unequal-weight example
README or usage docs were updated
Final report includes verification and review status
